meaning: adj.不能想象的,想象不到的,不可思议的,过分的
examples: Any thought of splitting up the company was unthinkable, they said.
To be exact — my husband's doctor uttered an unthinkable word: leukaemia.
Five years ago the making of such a programme would have been unthinkable.
Think the unthinkable, the thing that scares you to think about several times a day.
Arnold Pistorius described the runner's grief as "unthinkable" and says his heart bleeds for his nephew.
